name: Family Law Intake
description: Family law intake for family law attorneys and paralegals conducting an initial consultation for a divorce, custody, support, or other family law matter. Evaluates the matter type, the parties, the children involved, the assets and debts, the procedural posture, and the client's objectives to produce a family law intake profile with matter assessment and immediate action requirements. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
